svg.title: The LLM landscape — simplified for students
svg.desc: Two groups of LLMs: pay-per-use APIs and free open-weight models.
svg.text: Two types of AI models — the key question is: do you pay per call, or run it yourself?
Can I download the model and run it on my own machine?
Group 1 — Proprietary · API only · you pay per token · you never see the model weights
what you are using right now
Context window = how much text the model reads at once. 1M tokens ≈ 750,000 words ≈ ~10 novels.
Group 2 — Open-weight · free to download · run on your own GPU · no API bill
Snapshot: late May 2026 · sources: Artificial Analysis, LLM Stats · prices change monthly
